title: spiesia lanata
intro: Spiesia lanata, also known as Chrysanthemum indicum var. lanatum, is a plant species commonly referred to as the woolly chrysanthemum, characterized by its woolly stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid compounds. The health benefits of Spiesia lanata include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Spiesia lanata can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
